title: Puducherry election results 2026 LIVE: Ruling AINRC leads the race; CM Rangasamy secures comfortable majority in Thattanchavady
description: Businessman Jose Charles Martin, founder of LJK, has pulled off a victory in Kamaraj Nagar, Puducherry. Previously, the seat was held by BJP. Mr. Martin found the LJK late 2025. He won with a whopping margin of 10205 votes
